overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, digital billboards, and wet reflective streets. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing the player character walking under elevated highways and past modern commercial buildings with vibrant LED lighting.

events.description: beginning of clip in open urban plaza with large corporate signage visible
entering covered area beneath elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along wet pavement toward an illuminated overpass with neon reflections on the ground

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving along the multi-lane road ahead

entered.detail: illuminated corporate logo sign mounted high on building facade
large format LED advertising screens displaying colorful graphics
multi-level highway structure with support columns spanning across the street
reflective wet pavement surface showing neon light reflections
tall modern street light with glowing white fixture

segments.scene_description: The clip opens in a wide urban plaza at night, with the camera walking forward on wet reflective pavement toward an elevated highway. An illuminated Arasaka sign is visible high on the right, while digital billboards glow in the distance. The street is empty of pedestrians with only sparse vehicle traffic visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with programmable LED walls

events.description: LED wall panels cycle through vibrant colors including magenta, cyan, and yellow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass alongside a wall of cycling neon lights that illuminate the path with shifting colors

entered.detail: programmable LED wall panels cycling through pink, green, yellow, and blue colors
yellow and white striped plastic barriers lining the right side of walkway
linear fluorescent lights mounted to the underside of the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway, the scene becomes semi-enclosed with a vibrant LED wall on the left cycling through neon colors. The wet concrete path continues under the overpass structure, with construction barriers visible on the right. The artificial lighting creates a cyberpunk atmosphere with colorful reflections on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with skyscrapers and crosswalk

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at towering skyscrapers with illuminated facades
crossing the multi-lane wet asphalt road toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering buildings then crossing the street toward the commercial district

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the right side of the road with headlights on

entered.detail: tall glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows rising high above the street
massive vertical LED screens mounted on building facades displaying advertisements
white painted zebra stripes on the asphalt indicating pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the camera looks up at towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards before crossing the multi-lane street. The wet asphalt reflects the city lights as vehicles pass by, and the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk lined with commercial storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and transit shelter

events.description: passing a bus stop shelter with illuminated yellow interior lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and large format advertising displays

entered.detail: glass-fronted shops with interior lighting and merchandise displays
enclosed transit shelter with glass panels and warm yellow interior lighting
large vertical digital displays showing product advertisements
short black and yellow posts lining the edge of the sidewalk
yellow textured ground surface indicators for visually impaired pedestrians

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk, the scene features commercial storefronts with glowing interiors on the right and a bus stop shelter on the left. Large advertising billboards illuminate the path, while the camera continues forward past street bollards and tactile paving strips toward the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban district, moving from an open plaza into a sheltered underpass and finally across a bustling commercial thoroughfare. It begins on wet, reflective pavement in a wide plaza, gliding forward toward an elevated highway beneath the glow of a distant Arasaka sign and digital billboards. As the camera passes beneath the overpass, the environment becomes semi-enclosed, shifting into a corridor of vibrant LED walls and construction barriers that cast colorful reflections across the concrete. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the covered walkway, tilting upward to reveal towering skyscrapers before crossing a multi-lane street of shimmering asphalt and passing traffic. Finally, the movement settles onto an opposite sidewalk, passing glowing storefronts and a bus stop shelter while heading toward a distant intersection under the light of massive advertising billboards.
